examples: I have had enough obloquy for one lifetime.
"His long public life, so singularly checkered with good and evil, with glory and obloquy" (Macaulay).
He has faced obloquy and condemnation from Israel and Jewish groups worldwide in the wake of its findings.
The obloquy deepened in the ensuing days, during which it was reported that the cell phones of families of British soldiers killed in Iraq and Afghanistan may also have been hacked.
